message:
feat(tui): add TUI V2 widget snapshot tests (br-2bbt.11.1)

Add comprehensive snapshot tests for TUI V2 widgets:
- Command palette snapshots at 80x24 and 160x48
- Reservations screen snapshots at 80x24 and 120x40
- Tool metrics screen snapshots at 80x24 and 120x40
- Large terminal variants for dashboard, messages, search at 160x48

Also includes clippy fixes across multiple crates:
- Use map_or_else instead of if-let-else patterns in queries.rs
- Fix field_reassign_with_default in detection.rs tests
- Fix redundant_clone and float_cmp in embedder.rs
- Fix doc_markdown lints in schema_migration.rs
- Use inline format args in build_slots.rs and products.rs
- Fix name-based agent lookup in contacts.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
